title: Brevo vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Sendinblue email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings and which platform wins for your business.
intro: Brevo and Sendinblue are essentially the same platformŚSendinblue rebranded to Brevo in 2022. Both offer freemium all-in-one CRM suites combining email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat capabilities. This comparison helps clarify their relationship and why switching or choosing between them matters.

comparison_table.tool_a: Email, SMS, WhatsApp, Live Chat, CRM

choose_a_if: You want to use the current, actively developed platform with modern branding
You need a comprehensive multi-channel marketing solution with emphasis on integrated CRM
You prefer unlimited email campaigns on the free tier rather than daily limits
choose_b_if: You have existing integrations or workflows built with Sendinblue's legacy system
You prefer the original Sendinblue interface if you're already familiar with it
You want to maintain continuity with historical account data under the old brand name

faq.a: Brevo and Sendinblue are the same companyŚSendinblue rebranded to Brevo in 2022. They offer identical pricing, features, and performance. Brevo is simply the current platform name and recommended choice going forward, though both names may still appear in some legacy systems or documentation.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Both platforms are identically priced with a free tier supporting up to 100,000 contacts and paid plans starting at $25/month. There is no cost difference between them since they are the same service under different brand names.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Brevo?
faq.a: There's no need to switchŚSendinblue accounts have been automatically migrated to Brevo. If you're still using the Sendinblue interface, you can log in with the same credentials to access the updated Brevo platform. No data loss or interruption occurs during this transition.
